nasb.text: So the people went out and brought them and made booths for themselves, each on his roof, and in their courts and in the courts of the house of God, and in the square at the Water Gate and in the square at the Gate of Ephraim.

esv.text: So the people went out and brought them and made booths for themselves, each on his roof, and in their courts and in the courts of the house of God, and in the square at the Water Gate and in the square at the Gate of Ephraim.

cnv.text: 於是眾民出去，把樹枝帶回來，各人在自己的房頂上，在院子裡，　神的院中，水門的廣場，或是在以法蓮門的廣場搭棚。

ccb.text: 于是，民众都出去取来树枝，在自家的屋顶上、庭院里、上帝殿的院子里、水门的广场上和以法莲门的广场上搭棚。
